docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-05-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TIM MURPHY.
